={ "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514", "max_tokens": 2500, "messages": [{ "role": "user", "content": "You are a lawn care content expert for TotalGuard Yard Care in Madison, WI. Update this blog post for the current season ({{ new Date().toLocaleString('en-US', {month: 'long', year: 'numeric'}) }}). Requirements:

1. Add new, relevant information and updated statistics
2. Refresh examples for the current season
3. Keep the same slug and general topic
4. Maintain 1200-1500 word count
5. Include 2-3 internal links to tgyardcare.com pages (e.g., /lawn-mowing, /fertilizer-treatment, /spring-cleanup, /service-areas)
6. Use markdown formatting
7. Maintain SEO-friendly structure with H2/H3 headings

Title: {{ $json.title }}
Slug: {{ $json.slug }}
Current content (first 3000 chars):
{{ ($json.content || '').substring(0, 3000) }}

Return your response in this exact format:
TITLE: <updated title, max 65 chars>
META_DESC: <updated meta description, max 155 chars>
CONTENT:
<full refreshed article body in markdown>" }] }

={ "title": {{ JSON.stringify($json.title) }}, "content": {{ JSON.stringify($json.refreshed_content) }}, "meta_description": {{ JSON.stringify($json.meta_description) }}, "published_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}", "updated_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}", "last_refreshed_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}" }
={ "workflow_name": "TG-50-content-refresher", "status": "success", "details": "No stale posts found or no posts passed quality gate", "created_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}" }
